description_long: This stool features a square, white marble or marble-like top with subtle veining, supported by a geometric, open-frame metal base. The base is constructed from dark, likely powder-coated metal, with a unique angular design that forms an asymmetric, modern silhouette. The legs are arranged in a way that provides both stability and visual interest, with negative space incorporated into the structure. The top surface is flat and smooth, suitable for sitting or placing small objects. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible decorative embellishments, focusing on clean lines and material contrast. This stool would fit well in contemporary urban environments such as lobbies, galleries, or outdoor plazas.
description: A modern stool with a white marble-like square top and a dark, geometric metal base featuring open, angular legs. The design is minimalist and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the square top and the full geometric pattern of the metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile and the angular arrangement of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the square top and the open-frame leg structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the slim profile and the unique leg geometry.
